headline: Your supermarket beef might have travelled 2,400 kilometres. Ours stays in NSW.
subhead: Same week from the farm. Collected fresh from Brookvale hub. That is what a shorter supply chain tastes like.
hero_copy:
Industry data suggests supermarket beef travels an average of 2,400 kilometres before reaching the shelf. It can sit in cold storage for up to two or three weeks. By the time you buy it, nobody can tell you which farm it came from.

FarmThru beef is 100% grass-fed, from regenerative farms in NSW. It goes from paddock to our Brookvale hub within days. You collect it fresh. And every cut traces back to the farm that raised it.

sections.heading: Two supply chains, side by side
sections.body:
The supermarket way: farm to feedlot to abattoir to wholesaler to distribution centre to shelf. Potentially 2,400 kilometres. Up to two or three weeks in cold storage. The farmer earns a fraction of the price.

The FarmThru way: farm to hub to you. Days, not weeks. No feedlots, no wholesalers, no unnecessary steps in between. The farmer earns a fairer price. You get food that is genuinely fresh.

sections.heading: What you are actually eating
sections.body:
100% grass-fed beef from Rachel's Farm in Kempsey. Pork from Bundarra Farm. Wild-caught Alaskan salmon from Collins Wild Caught. Biodynamic dairy from Paris Creek. Eggs from Farmer Brown.

No hormones. No antibiotics. No feedlot finishing. Animals raised on open pasture, on regenerative land. Every product from a farm you can visit.

sections.heading: Order what you want, when you want
sections.body:
FarmThru is an online grocery store with a hub-and-collect model. You order from named farms, pick up from the Brookvale hub Monday to Friday. No lock-in. No minimum commitment. Also delivers to Sydney, Central Coast, and Wollongong.

We are launching an equity crowdfunding campaign on Birchal in mid-2026. Invest from $50 to $10,000. A $5 refundable deposit secures VIP access. Full details in the disclosure document on Birchal.

sections.heading: Compliance
sections.body: This is a pre-registration page for an upcoming equity crowdfunding campaign. No money is being raised at this stage. Any future offer will be made via a disclosure document on Birchal. This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice before making any investment decision.

creative_brief: Hero: split-screen visual. Left side: plastic-wrapped supermarket meat under fluorescent lights. Right side: fresh grass-fed steak on timber board in natural light. Below-fold: animated supply chain comparison graphic. Named farm partner portraits. Brookvale hub lifestyle shot. Let the contrast do the selling.
